single sources of truth were established and maintained.

  • Implementation code maintained as SSOT for completed consolidation work (training, clan missions)

OPEN LOOPS IDENTIFIED

cleanup cycle 6 targets identified.

FUTURE STATE BINDING

  • overlapping maintenance paths
